settings.label: Hero subheading
settings.default: Customize this from the theme settings.

settings.label: Size chart URL (opens in new tab)
settings.info: Optional link for “Size chart” on the product page matrix row. Hover shows a short hint (matches aico-commerce).

name: Preorder (mock)
info: Demo values rendered when no live PreorderSession is bound to the page. Real sessions always override these.

settings.label: Preorder banner image (theme asset filename)
settings.info: Single decorative image beside the preorder title — not a full-bleed background. Place the file in theme assets (e.g. preorder.png).

name: Brand pages
info: Per-brand campaign content for /brand/<handle>. Keyed by the brand’s PIM url handle. Each entry sets the hero (image / heading / CTA) and pins up to four featured product SKUs. The “Aktuelles” strip pulls the latest news for the brand automatically — no config needed.

settings.content: Edited as JSON in config/settings_data.json under "aico_brand_campaigns": { "<brand-handle>": { "hero_title": "…", "hero_cta_label": "…", "hero_cta_url": "/products/<handle>", "hero_image": "https://…", "featured_skus": ["SKU1","SKU2","SKU3","SKU4"] } }. Omit hero_image to fall back to the brand’s own image; omit a field to hide it.

settings.label: Searchable brands
settings.info: Comma-separated brand IDs (or names) the search drawer may return — e.g. "3,6,7" or "kybun, Joya, kybunjoya". Leave empty to allow every brand the shopper can access. Shoppers still only see brands they have access to.
